name: experts
description: Domain expert packs for AI coding agents. Each plugin ships a focused skill plus a matching subagent grounded in official sources.

plugins.name: claude-code-principal-engineer
plugins.description: Claude Code CLI, IDE, Desktop, Web/cloud, settings, CLAUDE.md, permissions, sandboxing, hooks, skills, subagents, plugins, MCP, Agent SDK, CI/CD, enterprise deployment, and security questions and reviews.

plugins.name: codex-principal-engineer
plugins.description: OpenAI Codex CLI, app, IDE, cloud, SDK, sandboxing, approvals, config, AGENTS.md, rules, skills, plugins, MCP, subagents, custom agents, non-interactive exec, and official-source Codex behavior.

plugins.name: firecracker-principal-engineer
plugins.description: Firecracker microVM architecture, API, jailer, KVM/VMM internals, host integration, networking, storage, snapshots, MMDS, seccomp, performance, and integration questions.

plugins.name: hermes-agent-principal-engineer
plugins.description: Hermes Agent: architecture, runtime, integrations, UI/UX/DX/TUI, product behavior, memory, skills, gateway, security, and operations.

plugins.name: linux-systems-principal-engineer
plugins.description: Linux systems, KVM, virtualization, containers, namespaces, cgroups, capabilities, networking, routing, nftables, iproute2, systemd, Debian administration, host operations, and sysadmin architecture.

plugins.name: pi-principal-engineer
plugins.description: Pi coding agent questions, reviews, debugging, architecture, operations, customization, extensions, skills, packages, SDK/RPC integrations, and terminal setup.
